name: Number of women affected by PCOS
evidence_text: A disorder that affects 170 million women worldwide.

name: Survey responses for renaming consensus
evidence_text: The consensus to rename the condition was based on more than 14,000 survey responses from patients and health professionals worldwide.

name: Global prevalence of PCOS
evidence_text: affects around one in eight women globally, or more than 170 million women

name: Prevalence of PCOS in India
evidence_text: where experts estimate the prevalence of the condition to be between 16 and 18 per cent

name: Prevalence of PCOS
evidence_text: PCOS affects an estimated 10–13% of reproductive-aged women.

name: Undiagnosed PCOS
evidence_text: It is estimated that up 70% of women with PCOS worldwide do not know they have this condition.

name: Estimated number of women affected by PCOS
evidence_text: PCOS is estimated to affect 170 million women during their reproductive years alone.

name: Percentage of undiagnosed individuals
evidence_text: These factors delay diagnosis—with up to 70% of affected individuals remaining undiagnosed.

name: participants
evidence_text: The trial, which enrolled over 9,000 participants across five countries.

name: hospital-free days
evidence_text: Participants in both groups received their assigned IV fluid type for 24-48 hours and achieved a median of 23 hospital-free days during the 28 days following enrollment.
